caption: In a studio setting filled with framed photographs and clothing on racks, a man is seated wearing a white button-down shirt, brown suspenders, a bow tie, glasses, and large over-ear headphones. He wears a grey, textured wig that stands upright. A black microphone is positioned in the foreground. On-screen text includes the logo "P STUDIO PODCAST" and the phrase "GOSS TALK JOY." Across the sequence, the man shifts his posture and hand movements. Initially, he raises his right hand toward his head, then brings his hand to his face to adjust his glasses. He then lowers his arm and looks slightly to the side with a neutral expression, ending the sequence by looking forward. The background remains static, featuring a wall of small framed pictures and apparel items, including a "LEE" branded product.
